summary: iOS 🟥 ANC | Settings for Transparency mode are not properly applied/saved
scenario: Transparency Mode sub-setting reverts to default when switching between Environment and Speech on Surround 85, Voyager Free 60, and Voyager Free 20
description_clean: Settings for Transparency mode (Environment and Speech sub-settings) are not properly applied or saved. When the user sets Transparency to Environment, closes settings, then reopens and sets it to Speech (or vice versa), the setting reverts to a default instead of saving the user's selection. On Surround 85 it always reverts to Speech; on Free 60 and Free 20 it always reverts to Environment.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name (e.g., Surround 85, Free 60, or Free 20) to open Device Settings.
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC → Transparency Mode.
Close the Poly Studio Mobile app (or navigate back to Home).
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate back to Audio Settings → ANC → Transparency Mode.
Observe the current Transparency Mode setting.
Reopen and navigate back to Transparency Mode.
Observe the current Transparency Mode setting.
expected: The Transparency Mode setting should persist and reflect the user's last selection (Environment or Speech) after closing and reopening the app.
actual: On Surround 85, the setting always reverts to Speech. On Free 60 and Free 20, the setting always reverts to Environment.
